faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Still have questions? We've got you covered.

items.q: What is a wedding guest list manager?
items.a: A wedding guest list manager helps you organise all your guests, track RSVPs, group families, and manage dietary requirements — all in one place. Wedding Waitress makes it simple and stress-free.

items.q: How does a wedding seating chart work?
items.a: Our wedding seating chart lets you create tables, drag and drop guests into seats, and visualise your entire venue layout. Export print-ready charts for your big day.

items.q: Can I use a QR code for wedding seating?
items.a: Yes! With our QR code seating chart, guests scan a code at the venue and instantly see their table assignment — no app download needed.

items.q: How do online wedding RSVPs work?
items.a: Send digital wedding invitations via email or SMS with a built-in RSVP link. Guests respond online and you track everything in real time.

items.q: Can I send digital wedding invitations?
items.a: Absolutely. Design beautiful digital invitations, add QR codes, and send them directly to your guests with built-in RSVP tracking.
No. Guests scan a QR code or click a link — no login, app, or download required.

items.q: Is Wedding Waitress suitable for venues and planners?
items.a: Yes. Our Vendor Pro plan is built for venues, planners, DJs, and event professionals.

items.q: What happens after the 7-day free trial?
items.a: You can upgrade anytime. If you don't, your data stays safe and you can return later.
We offer a full refund within 14 days of purchase if you haven't exceeded the free trial limits.

items.q: Is a QR code seating chart better than printed boards?
items.a: Yes — QR code seating charts eliminate crowding, allow instant updates, and provide a cleaner, more modern experience for guests.

items.q: How do I create a QR code wedding seating chart?
items.a: Simply upload your guest list, assign tables, and generate your QR code using Wedding Waitress. It takes just a few minutes.

items.q: Can I update my seating chart on the wedding day?
items.a: Yes — you can make changes instantly, and guests will always see the latest version when they scan the QR code.

items.q: Will older guests be able to use a digital seating chart?
items.a: Yes — guests can zoom in on their phones, making it easier than reading small printed text. A small backup list can also be provided if needed.

items.q: Do QR code seating charts work for large weddings?
items.a: Yes — they prevent crowding and allow guests to find their table quickly without waiting.

items.q: Do guests need an app to view their table?
items.a: No — guests simply scan the QR code using their phone camera. No app is required.

seating.title: Wedding Guest List Management & RSVP Tracker
seating.description: Effortlessly manage your wedding guest list with a powerful and easy-to-use guest list manager. Add guests individually or as couples and families, track RSVPs in real-time, manage plus-ones, and organise seating arrangements with complete clarity.
seating.pageTitle: Wedding Guest List Manager | Track RSVPs & Guests Easily
seating.metaDesc: Easily manage your wedding guest list, track RSVPs, organise families, and control plus-ones with our powerful wedding guest list manager tool.
seating.seo1Heading: Manage Your Wedding Guest List Online
seating.seo1Text: Add, edit, and organise your entire wedding guest list from any device. Keep track of every guest, couple, and family group in one central place with real-time updates. Once your guest list is ready, you can easily create your <0>wedding seating chart</0> or send <1>digital invitations</1> to every guest.
seating.seo2Text: See who's attending, who's declined, and who's yet to respond — all updated instantly. Guests can also RSVP directly using your <0>QR code RSVP system</0>, making the process seamless for everyone.
seating.seo3Text: Group guests into families, manage plus-ones, and assign relationships with ease. Wedding Waitress keeps your guest list structured and clear, no matter the size of your event.

qrSeating.title: Wedding Seating Chart Planner & Table Management
qrSeating.description: Create and organise your wedding tables with ease using a smart table planning tool. Set up table names, assign guests, balance numbers, and visually manage seating arrangements for your reception.
qrSeating.pageTitle: Wedding Seating Chart Planner | Organise Tables & Guests
qrSeating.metaDesc: Create and manage your wedding seating chart with ease. Assign guests to tables, balance groups, and design your perfect reception layout.
qrSeating.seo1Heading: Create Your Wedding Seating Chart Easily
qrSeating.seo1Text: Import your <0>wedding guest list</0> and assign tables in minutes with an intuitive drag-and-drop interface. See your full layout come together visually as you build it.
qrSeating.seo2Heading: Assign Guests to Tables with Precision
qrSeating.seo2Text: Place guests exactly where they belong. Once your tables are set, let guests find their seats instantly via <0>QR code</0> on the day.
qrSeating.seo3Text: Ensure every table is balanced and every guest has the best experience. Pair your seating chart with a <0>venue floor plan</0> for complete visual control over your reception.

planning.title: QR Code Wedding RSVP & Guest Seating Access
planning.description: Give your guests a seamless, modern experience with a QR code seating chart. Guests simply scan the code to instantly find their table, seat, and event details on their phone — no confusion, no waiting.
planning.pageTitle: QR Code Wedding RSVP & Seating Chart | Digital Guest Access
planning.metaDesc: Let guests scan a QR code to find their seat, RSVP, and access event details instantly. Simplify your wedding with smart digital tools.
planning.seo1Heading: Let Guests RSVP Instantly via QR Code
planning.seo1Text: Share a single QR code that lets guests confirm their attendance from your <0>wedding guest list</0>, update dietary needs, and respond to your invitation — all from their phone in seconds.
planning.seo2Text: Guests scan and instantly see their table from your <0>seating chart</0>, seat assignment, and event details. No more printed charts or confusion at the door.
planning.seo3Heading: Simplify Guest Experience at Your Event
planning.seo3Text: Create a modern, tech-forward guest experience. Pair your QR code with a <0>kiosk live view</0> at your venue entrance for even smoother guest flow.

invitations.title: Digital Wedding Invitations & RSVP Management
invitations.description: Design and send beautiful wedding invitations, save the dates, and thank you cards with ease. Create stunning digital or printable designs, customise your wording, and share instantly via email, SMS, or QR code.
invitations.pageTitle: Digital Wedding Invitations & RSVP Cards | Easy Online Invites
invitations.metaDesc: Design and send beautiful digital wedding invitations, save the dates, and RSVP cards. Share instantly or download for print.
invitations.seo1Text: Create gorgeous digital invitations and share them instantly with guests from your <0>wedding guest list</0>. No printing, no postage, no delays.
invitations.seo2Text: Track every response in real time. Guests can also RSVP via your <0>QR code RSVP system</0> for a seamless, modern experience.
invitations.seo3Text: Design stunning save the date cards that match your wedding style. Once guests respond, assign them to tables using your <0>seating chart planner</0>.

events.title: Your Events, Your Way
events.description: Manage multiple weddings, engagements, or corporate events from a single dashboard. Customise each event with unique settings, guest lists, and seating plans — perfect for couples and professional event planners alike.
events.pageTitle: Wedding Event Manager | Plan Multiple Events Easily
events.metaDesc: Manage multiple weddings and events from one dashboard. Customise settings, guest lists, and seating plans for each event.
events.seo1Heading: Manage Multiple Events from One Place
events.seo1Text: Whether you're planning a wedding, engagement party, or corporate function, manage all your events from a single dashboard — each with its own <0>guest list</0> and settings.
events.seo2Text: Set unique guest limits, venues, timelines, and <0>seating plans</0> for every event. Each one gets its own dedicated configuration.
events.seo3Text: Wedding Waitress is built for both couples planning their own wedding and professional event planners. Coordinate everything from your <0>timeline and running sheet</0> to table layouts.

guestList.title: Wedding Timeline Planner & Running Sheet Tool
guestList.description: Create and manage your wedding or event in one beautiful place. Add your ceremony and reception details, set guest limits, track RSVP deadlines, and stay organised from day one.
guestList.pageTitle: Wedding Timeline Planner | Running Sheet & Schedule Tool
guestList.metaDesc: Create a detailed wedding timeline and running sheet. Plan every moment from ceremony to reception with ease.
guestList.seo1Text: Build a detailed timeline for your wedding day. Coordinate timing with your <0>DJ & MC questionnaire</0> to keep music and announcements perfectly aligned.
guestList.seo2Text: Structure your ceremony, reception, speeches, and entertainment into a clear running sheet. Reference your <0>wedding guest list</0> to ensure key moments include the right people.
guestList.seo3Text: Export and share your running sheet with your venue, photographer, DJ, and wedding party so everyone is aligned and prepared.

placeCards.title: Wedding Place Cards Generator & Printable Name Cards
placeCards.description: Create elegant and personalised name place cards for your wedding or event in just minutes. Easily generate guest names, customise fonts and layouts, and print professional-quality place cards directly from your seating plan.
placeCards.pageTitle: Wedding Place Cards Generator | Printable Name Cards
placeCards.metaDesc: Create elegant wedding place cards with guest names and table numbers. Download printable designs for your reception.
placeCards.seo1Text: Design beautiful place cards with your guests' names, table numbers, and seat assignments pulled directly from your <0>wedding seating chart</0>.
placeCards.seo2Text: Export your place cards in high-resolution 300 DPI format, ready for professional printing. Pair them with <0>individual table charts</0> for a polished table presentation.
placeCards.seo3Text: Add personalised messages, dietary icons, and custom styling to each place card. Wedding Waitress makes every detail count for a memorable guest experience.

tableCharts.title: Individual Table Seating Charts
tableCharts.description: Create clear and beautifully organised individual table seating charts for your wedding or event. Display each table's guest list with ease, making it simple for guests to find their seats quickly and confidently.
tableCharts.pageTitle: Individual Table Seating Charts | Wedding Table Layout Tool
tableCharts.metaDesc: Generate detailed seating charts for each table. Perfect for printing and helping guests find their seats quickly.
tableCharts.seo1Text: Create a dedicated seating chart for each table at your reception, pulling data directly from your <0>full seating chart</0>.
tableCharts.seo2Text: Export individual table charts for printing and place them at each table. Pair with <0>your guest list</0> to ensure every name is accounted for.
tableCharts.seo3Text: Adjust fonts, colours, and layout options to match your wedding design. Every table chart is tailored to look professional and on-brand.

dietary.title: Wedding Dietary Requirements & Guest Meal Planner
dietary.description: Easily collect and manage dietary requirements for your wedding or event. Track guest allergies, preferences, and special meal requests in one organised system, ensuring every guest is catered for.
dietary.pageTitle: Wedding Dietary Requirements List | Guest Meal Planner
dietary.metaDesc: Track guest dietary requirements including vegetarian, vegan, halal, and allergies. Share with your venue or caterer easily.
dietary.seo1Text: Collect dietary requirements from every guest in your <0>wedding guest list</0> — including vegetarian, vegan, halal, kosher, gluten-free, and custom preferences.
dietary.seo2Text: Keep a clear record of food allergies and special requests. This data syncs with your <0>seating chart</0> so your venue team knows exactly what each table needs.
dietary.seo3Text: Export your dietary summary and share it directly with your venue or caterer. Save time and avoid miscommunication on the day.

fullSeating.title: Complete Wedding Seating Chart & Guest Layout Planner
fullSeating.description: Visualise your entire wedding or event with a complete seating chart in one clear view. Easily organise tables, assign guests, and manage seating arrangements with a simple and intuitive layout.
fullSeating.pageTitle: Full Wedding Seating Chart | Complete Guest Layout Planner
fullSeating.metaDesc: View and export your full wedding seating chart. Organise every guest, table, and seat in one clear layout.
fullSeating.seo1Text: See every table and guest in one comprehensive view. For a closer look at each table, use the <0>individual table seating charts</0>.
fullSeating.seo2Text: Ensure no guest is missed or misplaced. Your full chart pulls directly from your <0>wedding guest list</0>, keeping everything in sync.
fullSeating.seo3Text: Download your complete seating chart as a professional PDF, ready for printing and sharing with your venue, coordinator, or wedding party.

kiosk.title: Wedding Guest Check-In Kiosk & Live Lookup System
kiosk.description: Create a professional and interactive guest experience with a live kiosk display. Allow guests to quickly search their name and find their table, seat, or event details on a digital screen.
kiosk.pageTitle: Wedding Check-In Kiosk | Guest Lookup & Entry System
kiosk.metaDesc: Set up a live guest check-in kiosk. Let guests search their name and find their table instantly at your event entrance.
kiosk.seo1Text: Set up a digital kiosk at your venue entrance powered by your <0>QR code system</0>. It's fast, professional, and reduces queues on arrival.
kiosk.seo2Text: Guests simply search their name and instantly see their table number and seat from your <0>guest list</0> — no staff assistance needed.
kiosk.seo3Text: Create a smooth, modern arrival experience that impresses your guests and keeps your event running on time from the very first moment.

djMc.title: Wedding Music Planner & DJ MC Questionnaire
djMc.description: Take the stress out of planning your music, announcements, and event flow with a complete DJ and MC questionnaire. Capture key details like song selections, special moments, run sheet timing, and important instructions — all in one place.
djMc.pageTitle: Wedding Music Planner | DJ & MC Song List Organizer
djMc.metaDesc: Plan your wedding music with a complete DJ and MC questionnaire. Organise songs, entrances, and special moments easily.
djMc.seo1Text: Organise every musical moment from the ceremony entrance to the last dance. Align your music choices with your <0>wedding running sheet</0> for perfect timing.
djMc.seo2Text: Build your must-play, do-not-play, and maybe lists with ease. Keep your music selections organised and easy to share with your DJ or MC.
djMc.seo3Text: Share your completed questionnaire directly with your DJ or MC. Ensure they have every detail they need for a seamless, perfectly timed event.

floorPlan.title: Wedding Floor Plan Creator & Venue Layout Designer
floorPlan.description: Design and visualise your wedding or event layout with an easy-to-use venue floor plan tool. Arrange tables, ceremony seating, stages, and key areas to match your space perfectly.
floorPlan.pageTitle: Wedding Floor Plan Creator | Venue Layout & Seating Design
floorPlan.metaDesc: Design your wedding venue layout with a visual floor plan tool. Arrange seating, ceremony setup, and reception flow.
floorPlan.seo1Text: Create a detailed floor plan for your wedding venue. Align your layout with your <0>seating chart planner</0> to ensure tables fit perfectly within your space.
floorPlan.seo2Text: Design both your ceremony and reception layouts in one tool. Coordinate your <0>table arrangements</0> with the physical venue for a seamless flow.
floorPlan.seo3Text: See how your tables and seating fit within your venue space. Adjust layouts in real time to ensure everything works perfectly on the day.
